positive: An aesthetically pleasing, stylized line-art representation of a celestial forest meeting the sea. The composition should feature deep silhouettes of gnarled, magical trees with roots intertwining into the water. The sky is rendered with sweeping, abstract nebula gradients (deep indigo, cosmic teal, lavender), contrasting sharply with the clean black silhouettes of the flora and wave crests. Focus on strong graphic contrast and negative space. Perfect for a t-shirt print, suitable for a boho or nature-inspired aesthetic. Vector illustration quality, maximalist yet clean, high contrast, graphic novel style, central composition, symmetry, minimalist ink wash style, ethereal glow.
